sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Reserved candidate from place-point-nepean-01 shortlist (candidate D). Philip Mallis Defence Road looking east towards Cheviot Beach. Distinct composition from the place hero (A: waves near Cheviot Hill). Anti-twinning preserved.
sourcingNotes.crossReference: This candidate was carried in place-point-nepean-01 shortlist and reserved here per twinning protocol.

candidates.place: Point Nepean — Defence Road looking east towards Cheviot Beach
candidates.sourcingAgentNote: Defence Road perspective showing the walking path towards Cheviot Beach. The road/track composition invites the reader to walk the fort walk. 3901x2937 clears minimum. SA licence. Distinct from place-point-nepean-01 (waves near Cheviot Hill).

candidates.place: Point Nepean — hilltop looking west towards The Rip
candidates.sourcingAgentNote: Alternative: looking west along Defence Road towards The Rip. Shows the geography of the tip. If place-point-nepean-01 uses candidate C (which is also looking west), this candidate would twin — use candidate A instead in that case.

editorActionsRequested.question: Confirm twinning resolution with place-point-nepean-01. If place hero uses candidate A (Cheviot Hill waves), this slot should use candidate A (Defence Road east). If place hero uses candidate C (west towards The Rip), this slot should also use candidate A.
